title: E-Commerce Platform
meeting_summary: An online retailer wants to build a new e-commerce platform with a product catalog, shopping cart, payment integration, and an admin panel for order and inventory management. The site must support mobile and desktop, and handle up to 1,000 concurrent users.
estimation_markdown:
## Estimate: E-Commerce Platform

### Task Breakdown

| Task | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------:|-----------:|
| Product discovery and scoping | 16 | 1,000 |
| UI/UX design and interactive prototype | 40 | 2,500 |
| Product catalog and search | 50 | 3,125 |
| Shopping cart and checkout flow | 40 | 2,500 |
| Payment gateway integration | 24 | 1,500 |
| User accounts and order history | 28 | 1,750 |
| Admin panel (products, orders, users) | 44 | 2,750 |
| Email and transactional notifications | 16 | 1,000 |
| Performance optimization and SEO | 18 | 1,125 |
| QA, regression testing and UAT | 28 | 1,750 |
| DevOps, CI/CD and deployment | 16 | 1,000 |

### Totals

- Total hours: 320
- Total cost: 20,000 EUR

### Recommended Team

- 2 Full-Stack Developers
- 1 UX Designer (part-time)
- 1 QA Engineer (part-time)

### Estimated Duration

14 weeks

### Confidence Level

**Medium** — Core features are well defined. Uncertainty remains around third-party payment provider specifics and performance targets under load.

title: HR Employee Onboarding Portal
meeting_summary: An HR department needs an internal web portal to automate the onboarding of new hires. The portal should manage document collection, task assignments, and integrate with their Active Directory for SSO and Slack for notifications.
estimation_markdown:
## Estimate: HR Employee Onboarding Portal

### Task Breakdown

| Task | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------:|-----------:|
| Stakeholder interviews and process mapping | 16 | 1,000 |
| UX flows and form design | 24 | 1,500 |
| Onboarding workflow engine | 60 | 3,750 |
| Document upload and e-signature | 30 | 1,875 |
| Email and Slack notifications | 18 | 1,125 |
| HR admin panel and reporting | 24 | 1,500 |
| Active Directory / SSO integration | 22 | 1,375 |
| Automated task assignments | 20 | 1,250 |
| QA, accessibility audit and UAT | 14 | 875 |

### Totals

- Total hours: 228
- Total cost: 14,250 EUR

### Recommended Team

- 1 Full-Stack Developer
- 1 Backend Developer (part-time)
- 1 QA Engineer (part-time)

### Estimated Duration

9 weeks

### Confidence Level

**High** — Requirements are clear, integrations are well-documented, and the team has prior experience with Active Directory and Slack APIs.

title: IoT Sensor Monitoring Dashboard
meeting_summary: An industrial manufacturer wants a real-time IoT dashboard to monitor sensor data from factory floor equipment, trigger alerts on threshold breaches, and store historical readings for trend analysis.

breakdown.task: Historical data storage and query API

estimation_markdown:
## Estimate: IoT Sensor Monitoring Dashboard

### Task Breakdown

| Task | Hours | Cost (EUR) |
|------|------:|-----------:|
| IoT architecture and protocol scoping | 18 | 1,125 |
| Frontend dashboard UI/UX | 36 | 2,250 |
| Sensor data ingestion pipeline | 50 | 3,125 |
| Real-time WebSocket feed and visualizations | 30 | 1,875 |
| Alerting rules engine | 24 | 1,500 |
| Historical data storage and query API | 20 | 1,250 |
| Edge/cloud hybrid deployment | 22 | 1,375 |
| QA, load testing and documentation | 10 | 625 |

### Totals

- Total hours: 210
- Total cost: 13,125 EUR

### Recommended Team

- 1 Backend Engineer (IoT specialist)
- 1 Frontend Developer
- 1 DevOps Engineer (part-time)

### Estimated Duration

9 weeks

### Confidence Level

**Low** — Sensor protocols and data volumes have not been specified. Assumptions made on MQTT and 500 sensors; actual scope may vary significantly.
